title: Swim With Entity Behavior
description: Allows the entity follow another entity. Both entities must be swimming [ie, in water].

catch_up_multiplier.title: Catch Up Multiplier
catch_up_multiplier.description:
The multiplier this entity's speed is modified by when matching another entity's direction.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 2.5

catch_up_threshold.title: Catch Up Threshold
catch_up_threshold.description:
Distance, from the entity being followed, at which this entity will speed up to reach that entity.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 12

chance_to_stop.title: Chance To Stop
chance_to_stop.description:
Percent chance to stop following the current entity, if they're riding another entity or they're not swimming. 1.0 = 100%

Sample values:
• dolphin: 0.0333

entity_types.title: Entity Types
entity_types.description:
Filters which types of entities are valid to follow.

Sample values:
• dolphin: [{"filters":{"test":"is_family","subject":"othe...

match_direction_threshold.title: Match Direction Threshold
match_direction_threshold.description:
Distance, from the entity being followed, at which this entity will try to match that entity's direction

Sample values:
• dolphin: 2

search_range.title: Search Range
search_range.description:
Radius around this entity to search for another entity to follow.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 20

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description:
The multiplier this entity's speed is modified by when trying to catch up to the entity being followed.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 1.5

state_check_interval.title: State Check Interval
state_check_interval.description:
Time (in seconds) between checks to determine if this entity should catch up to the entity being followed or match the direction of the entity being followed.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 0.5

stop_distance.title: Stop Distance
stop_distance.description:
Distance, from the entity being followed, at which this entity will stop following that entity.

Sample values:
• dolphin: 5

success_rate.title: Success Rate
success_rate.description:
Percent chance to start following another entity, if not already doing so. 1.0 = 100%

Sample values:
• dolphin: 0.1

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
